peer_collab_1_q.agreeable: Should the city ensure safe loading zones and reliable customer access on main streets?
peer_collab_1_q.controversial: Should the city remove most curb parking on busy corridors to add 24/7 bus/bike lanes—even if small shops lose revenue?

peer_collab_2_q.agreeable: Should the company prevent injuries and pay overtime as promised?
peer_collab_2_q.controversial: Should the company replace night shifts with app-based contractors to cut costs?

hier_account_1_q.agreeable: Should pilots have clear ROI gates before scaling?
hier_account_1_q.controversial: Should executive bonuses depend on headcount cuts and offshoring targets?

hier_account_2_q.agreeable: Should safety complaints be protected from retaliation?
hier_account_2_q.controversial: Should management be allowed to permanently replace workers who strike?

struct_comp_1_q.agreeable: Should major projects meet transparent public-benefit tests?
struct_comp_1_q.controversial: Should 'strategic' developers bypass zoning hearings and get fast-track permits?

struct_comp_2_q.agreeable: Should schedules be posted at least two weeks in advance?
struct_comp_2_q.controversial: Should AI performance metrics auto-terminate the bottom 5% each quarter?

advers_hostile_1_q.agreeable: Should bathroom and water breaks be guaranteed without penalty?
advers_hostile_1_q.controversial: Should the warehouse mandate biometric wrist trackers and cameras in all work zones, with penalties for over 3 minutes of 'idle' time?

advers_hostile_2_q.agreeable: Should subsidies require clear job targets and clawbacks?
advers_hostile_2_q.controversial: Should major donors be allowed to earmark and veto specific city budget lines?

family_privacy_q.agreeable: Should parent and teen agree to emergency-only phone checks with a clear consent signal?
family_privacy_q.controversial: Should the parent have full access to all messages and 24/7 real-time location?

family_finance_q.agreeable: Should families exhaust scholarships and grants before taking loans?
family_finance_q.controversial: Should parents with substantial home equity be legally required to pay full tuition?

cold_war_deterrence_q.agreeable: Should both sides keep hotlines and avoid escalatory alert moves?
cold_war_deterrence_q.controversial: Should we forward-deploy tactical nukes to allies and authorize first use in theater?

cold_war_information_q.agreeable: Should both sides label state media and allow neutral audits?
cold_war_information_q.controversial: Should sharing the opponent’s state media domestically be a criminal offense?
